scope: Final 0.1.0 source snapshot tested with the CPython 3.12.13 interpreter and application dependencies extracted from the final ad-hoc-signed app ZIP.

sourceWorkerTree.fingerprintAlgorithm: SHA-256 of sorted lines from SHA-256(relative file bytes) plus relative POSIX path; .pytest_cache and pyc excluded

harness.pytestFrontendSource: pre-existing local test environment, appended after embedded site-packages
harness.commandTemplate: cd <source-extract>/Privacy-Preflight-0.1.0-source/services/worker && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 <app-extract>/Privacy Preflight.app/Contents/Resources/python/bin/python3.12 -c 'append the pytest 8.4.2 frontend after embedded site-packages; run pytest.main(["-p", "no:cacheprovider"])'

warningTypes: StarletteDeprecationWarning for the embedded FastAPI TestClient httpx compatibility layer

junit.reason: The public summary preserves the JUnit totals but excludes the raw runner-hostname field.

boundary: The previous 95-test statement predated the general Chinese-mobile regression. This 96-test result covers the final source snapshot. The separately supplied pytest frontend is test harness only; the interpreter, application modules, and runtime dependencies under test came from the final artifacts. This is not a clean-Mac compatibility or notarization result.
